title: SpellHud Addon
description: Adds 3+ more hud options to Spell Engine's Hud
body:
# 🔧 Spell HUD Addon – Extra Layouts for Spell Engine

This addon extends the Spell Engine HUD with two additional layout options in the config menu:

## 🆕 New Layout Options:

### Grid 3x3 (Version 1.0.5+ now has the up and downwards version of this)

*   Organize your spells in a compact 3x3 grid

### Vertical Bar (Version 1.0.5+ now has the up and downwards version of this)

*   Display your spell hotbar in a clean vertical column on the screen

**Spell Engine's Hud Config** ![New button](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_4302a5b4-a6b1-4e13-aca9-73a7a51d03b6.png)

![Grid 3x3](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_62815f64-c365-41c6-8c8e-57e2652924df.png)

![Vertical](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_2487d506-1947-475e-aad9-ebd281fc7326.png)

## Requires:

*   [Spell Engine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spell-engine)
